name: perfect-pitch-deck
description: Reveal.js pitch-deck template with optional staticrypt gate, GHL form integration, and Cloudflare Pages deploy.

scripts.setup-cf: npx wrangler pages project create "${CF_PROJECT:?CF_PROJECT is not set}" --production-branch=main
scripts.deploy: npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name "${CF_PROJECT:?CF_PROJECT is not set}" --commit-dirty=true --branch=main
scripts.ship: npm run build && npm run deploy
